description: CompositionPink round neck jacket made of 100% cotton, has a crew neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, panel on the sides, embroidered nike swoosh on the left chest and a ribbed hemFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style this season with this jacket from nike. The fabric is sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while you look stylish with the sharp silhouetting. Wear this jacket over jeans or track pants to keep the cold wind away.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
